name: EventHandler Validation - Group 2 (19 types)
description: Test all Group 2 EventHandler types: ChangePropertyAura through Cooldown

steps.name: Group 2 - Test all 19 EventHandler types
steps.code: var results = new System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary<string, bool>(); var types = new[] { "ChangePropertyAura", "ChangePropertyConditional", "ChangePropertyConsecutive", "ChangePropertyTarget", "ChangeRangesOfSkillsWithTags", "ChangeSkillsWithTags", "ChangeSkillUseAmount", "ChangeStance", "ChangeSupplyCosts", "ChangeSuppression", "ChangeUsesPerSquaddie", "Charge", "ChargeInfantry", "ClearTileEffect", "ClearTileEffectGroup", "CommandMove", "CommandUseSkill", "ConsumeOnSkillUse", "Cooldown" }; var skills = Menace.SDK.Templates.FindAll("SkillTemplate"); foreach (var typeName in types) { var found = false; foreach (var skill in skills) { try { var handlers = Menace.SDK.Templates.GetProperty("SkillTemplate", skill.ReadString("name"), "EventHandlers"); if (handlers != null) { var array = handlers.Cast<Il2CppSystem.Object[]>(); foreach (var handler in array) { var type = handler.ReadString("_type"); if (type == typeName) { found = true; break; } } if (found) break; } } catch { } } results[typeName] = found; } var passed = results.Values.Count(v => v); var total = results.Count; UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"Group 2 Results: {passed}/{total} types found"); foreach (var kvp in results) { UnityEngine.Debug.Log($"  {kvp.Key}: {(kvp.Value ? "✓" : "✗")}"); } passed == total
